title: Computational Aspects of Data Security: A Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the core computational processes and their relationships in ensuring data security and privacy.
relationships: Data Input is processed by an Encryption Algorithm using a key from Key Management to produce Ciphertext
Data is also passed through a Hashing Function to create a unique Digest for integrity verification
Ciphertext can be processed by Secure Computation techniques for analysis without decryption
Ciphertext is decrypted by an Authorized User with the correct key from Key Management to produce the final Data Output
